Euphrasia campanulata is a type of flowering plant, commonly known as a species of "eyebright," which is a plant used in herbal medicine. The health benefits of Euphrasia campanulata include its potential to treat eye problems, such as conjunctivitis, and its anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce swelling and alleviate symptoms. The bioactive constituents of Euphrasia campanulata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Euphrasia campanulata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat eye problems and other inflammatory conditions.
